unqualified: Thank you for contacting us. Unfortunately, we're unable to assist at this time.
We appreciate your interest but cannot help at this moment.
callback: A representative will call you back within 24 hours.
We'll contact you shortly. Please stay by your phone.
transfer: I'm transferring you to a specialist who can help.
Please hold while I connect you to the appropriate department.
general: Thank you for calling. How may I assist you?
Welcome! How can I help you today?
